data.title: Many users reported that social platform X experienced service interruption
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that many users reported that X had service interruptions. According to the network status monitoring website DownDetector, 5,343 users in the UK reported that social platform X had service interruptions, and 11,166 users in the United States reported that social platform X had malfunctions.

data.title: Service Disruption Reported On Social Platform X In The UK And US
data.description: According to Odaily, numerous users have reported service interruptions on the social platform X. Monitoring site DownDetector indicates that 5,343 users in the United Kingdom have experienced disruptions, while 11,166 users in the United States have reported issues with the platform.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 81,000 USDT with a 3.26% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 10, 2025, 14:04 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 81,000 USDT and is now trading at 80,676.65625 USDT, with a narrowed 3.26% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: MyShell releases “Official Statement on Binance Announcement and $SHELL Buyback Plan”
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News MyShell released an "Official Statement on Binance Announcement and $SHELL Repurchase Plan":
"On March 7, we received a notification from the Binance team about unusual activities involving one of our market makers. In response, we immediately terminated our relationship with the market maker and introduced several new partners to ensure stable liquidity. All Binance accounts related to the market maker have been suspended, and all remaining assets will be transferred to our new market maker. In addition, all stablecoins sold by the market maker will be used to repurchase $SHELL within 90 days. To ensure full transparency, we will publish the wallet addresses related to the repurchase for community verification. In addition, we are working closely with Binance to make this process open and transparent."

data.title: Deutsche Bank: US policy uncertainty may lead to continued increase in crypto market volatility
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Marion Laboure, an analyst at Deutsche Bank, said: "If there are no clear details of Trump's Bitcoin reserve plan, the volatility of cryptocurrencies may remain high. The timing, funds and allocation are uncertain. The market is cautious, staring at gains if the plan progresses, and staring at losses if it stagnates." (Jinshi)

data.title: UK Treasury: No plans to introduce US-style Bitcoin reserves
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to market news, the UK Treasury said it has "no plans" to introduce US-style Bitcoin reserves. (Jinshi)

data.title: Kraken receives EMI authorization from the UK Financial Conduct Authority
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the cryptocurrency exchange Kraken announced that it has officially obtained the Electronic Money Institution (EMI) authorization issued by the UK Financial Conduct Authority (FCA), allowing it to issue electronic currency and speed up deposits and withdrawals for customers, thereby enhancing its market position in the UK.
